mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stamps (id, user_id, place_id, photo_url, visited_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{placeId}, #{photoUrl}, #{visitedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.place_id, p.name AS place_name, s.photo_url, s.visited_at FROM stamps s LEFT JOIN places p ON s.place_id = p.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.visited_at DESC
